biological_replicate: with 2 µM rapamycin or vehicle in two independent experiments.
experimental_design: treatment of HeLa cell lysates as well as direct treatment of live HeLa cells.
number_of_fractions: This digest pool was fractionated into 10-12 fractions.
number_of_samples: 2 biological replicates and 10-12 fractions lead to a total of 20-24 samples.
